reasoning: Dekho, TMC ne bengal ko loota, yeh to fact hai—Sandeshkhali, SSC scam, sab kuch proved. Shantanu Thakur ne Matua community ke liye CAA implement kiya, aur mere area mein wo matter karta hai. Lekin sach kahu to mera confidence pehle jaisa nahi raha—Kejriwal arrest, Sandeshkhali ka political use, ED ke patterns... sab dekh ke mujhe doubt ho gaya. Lekin kya kare, TMC ke alternative to yeh hi hai, aur Biswajit Das to typical politician hai jo jaha power hai waha chala jata hai. So mai vote to BJP ko de dunga, lekin yeh vote maine 2019 ki tarah khushi se nahi de raha.
primary_drivers: TMC corruption is proven—SSC scam, land grabs, Sandeshkhali happened under their watch
Shantanu Thakur delivers for Matua community locally—CAA implementation matters
Newfound doubt about ED arrests, political timing, and system integrity—but no better alternative visible
